zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine於大約1076年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根南希時，他的父親Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"33歲，母親Hedwig von Formbach28歲。他於大約1112年與Adelheid van Leuven結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1139年1月13日在法國洛萊沃斯格斯沙吉迪艾享年64歲，埋葬在法國洛萊沃斯格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine于大约1076年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根南希时，他的父亲Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"33岁，母亲Hedwig von Formbach28岁。他于大约1112年与Adelheid van Leuven结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1139年1月13日在法国洛萊沃斯格斯沙吉迪艾享年64岁，埋葬在法国洛萊沃斯格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothy .

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Grois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: possibly referring to Middle Dutch grues ‘powder, grit, gravel, slack’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a digger, a miner or a stonemason, or perhaps a metaphorical nickname for a poorly and dirty man.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine was born about 1076, in Nancy, Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", was 33 and his mother, Hedwig von Formbach, was 28. He married Adelheid van Leuven about 1112. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 13 January 1139, in Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Vosges, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine est né environ 1076, à Nancy, Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", avait 33 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Formbach, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid van Leuven environ 1112. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1139, à Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Vosges, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine um 1076 in Nancy, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" 33 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Formbach 28. Er hat um 1112 Adelheid van Leuven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Januar 1139 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Vosges, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine è nato il circa 1076 nel Nancy, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Formbach, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid van Leuven circa 1112. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1139, nel Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraineが約1076年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンナンシで生まれた時，父Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"は33歳，母Hedwig von Formbachは28歳であった。約1112年にAdelheid van Leuvenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1139年1月13日にフランスロレィヌボスジェズサイント-ディeで64歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌボスジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine(이)가 대략 1076년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant"(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Formbach(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1112년 Adelheid van Leuven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1139년 1월 13일 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스 세인트-디e에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 보스그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Nancy, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Formbach, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid van Leuven aproximadamente 1112. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1139, em Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, França, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Vosges, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine родился около 1076 г. в местности нанси, лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant" было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Formbach, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid van Leuven около 1112 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 13 января 1139 г. в местности сеинт-диe, фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности фосгесь, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine nació aproximadamente 1076, en Nancy, Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Thierry II de Lorraine dit "Le Vaillant", tenía 33 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Formbach, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Adelheid van Leuven aproximadamente 1112. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1139, en Saint-Dié, Vosges, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Vosges, Lorraine, Francia.
